welcome_description: A complete starter template for Next.js projects with multi-language support, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and configured best practices.
github_star_text: If you find this template useful, please consider giving it a star on GitHub!
contribute_text: If you think this template could be improved or you have ideas for new features, feel free to open a Pull Request or propose a feature!

legal_notice_subject_desc: This website www.portasicilia.it is owned by the above-mentioned holder and is dedicated to the promotion and marketing of products and services related to the Sicilian territory, including food products.
legal_notice_liability_desc: The site owner is committed to keeping the information up to date and accurate, but does not guarantee the absence of errors or inaccuracies. The owner is not responsible for any damages resulting from the improper use of the information on the site.
legal_notice_ip_desc: All content on the site (texts, images, trademarks, logos) is owned by the holder or licensed and may not be reproduced without written authorization.
legal_notice_external_links_desc: The site may contain links to third-party sites. The owner is not responsible for the content or policies of such sites.
legal_notice_jurisdiction_desc: These Legal Notes are governed by Italian law. For any dispute, the court of the consumer's place of residence or domicile shall have jurisdiction, as provided by law.

review_login_to_review: Log in to leave a review
admin_google_business_description: Enter your Google My Business page link to import Google reviews into your listing.
admin_google_business_guide_title: How to find your Google reviews link
admin_google_business_guide_step1_title: 1. Sign in to Google My Business
admin_google_business_guide_step1_text: Go to business.google.com and sign in with the Google account linked to your business.
admin_google_business_guide_step2_text: If you manage multiple businesses, select the one you want to get the reviews link for.
admin_google_business_guide_step3_text: Go to the "Home" section and look for the "Get more reviews" card. Click "Share review form" and copy the link that appears.
admin_google_business_guide_step4_text: Paste the copied link in the field below. The format will be similar to: https://g.page/r/... or https://search.google.com/local/writereview?placeid=...
admin_google_business_guide_note: Google reviews will be displayed on your listing with a Google badge next to the reviewer's name.
admin_google_business_sync_description: Import reviews from your Google My Business page. Syncing happens automatically every day, or you can trigger it manually.

privacy_intro: This Privacy Policy describes the policies of Sicily Good di Salvatore Guarneri, Cortile Gonzales 7, Lercara Friddi 90025, Italy, email: portasiciliainfo@gmail.com, phone: 3274522382 on the collection, use and disclosure of your information that we collect when you use our website (https://www.portasicilia.it/) (the "Service"). By accessing or using the Service, you are consenting to the collection, use and disclosure of your information in accordance with this Privacy Policy. If you do not consent to the same, please do not access or use the Service.
privacy_modifications: We may modify this Privacy Policy at any time without any prior notice to you and will post the revised Privacy Policy on the Service. The revised Policy will be effective 180 days from when the revised Policy is posted in the Service and your continued access or use of the Service after such time will constitute your acceptance of the revised Privacy Policy. We therefore recommend that you periodically review this page.
privacy_info_collect_desc: We will collect and process the following personal information about you:
privacy_how_collect_desc: We collect/receive information about you in the following manner:
privacy_how_collect_registration: When a user fills up the registration form or otherwise submits personal information
privacy_how_use_desc: We will use the information that we collect about you for the following purposes:
privacy_how_use_consent: If we want to use your information for any other purpose, we will ask you for consent and will use your information only on receiving your consent and then, only for the purpose(s) for which you grant consent unless we are required to do otherwise by law.
privacy_how_share_desc: We will not transfer your personal information to any third party without seeking your consent, except in limited circumstances as described below:
privacy_how_share_third_party: We require such third parties to use the personal information we transfer to them only for the purpose for which it was transferred and not to retain it for longer than is required for fulfilling the said purpose.
privacy_how_share_disclosure: We may also disclose your personal information for the following: (1) to comply with applicable law, regulation, court order or other legal process; (2) to enforce your agreements with us, including this Privacy Policy; or (3) to respond to claims that your use of the Service violates any third-party rights. If the Service or our company is merged or acquired with another company, your information will be one of the assets that is transferred to the new owner.
privacy_retention_desc: We will retain your personal information with us for 90 days to 2 years after user accounts remain idle or for as long as we need it to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected as detailed in this Privacy Policy. We may need to retain certain information for longer periods such as record-keeping / reporting in accordance with applicable law or for other legitimate reasons like enforcement of legal rights, fraud prevention, etc. Residual anonymous information and aggregate information, neither of which identifies you (directly or indirectly), may be stored indefinitely.
privacy_rights_desc: Depending on the law that applies, you may have a right to access and rectify or erase your personal data or receive a copy of your personal data, restrict or object to the active processing of your data, ask us to share (port) your personal information to another entity, withdraw any consent you provided to us to process your data, a right to lodge a complaint with a statutory authority and such other rights as may be relevant under applicable laws. To exercise these rights, you can write to us at portasiciliainfo@gmail.com. We will respond to your request in accordance with applicable law.
privacy_rights_note: Do note that if you do not allow us to collect or process the required personal information or withdraw the consent to process the same for the required purposes, you may not be able to access or use the services for which your information was sought.
privacy_cookies_desc: To learn more about how we use these and your choices in relation to these tracking technologies, please refer to our Cookie Policy.
privacy_security_desc: The security of your information is important to us and we will use reasonable security measures to prevent the loss, misuse or unauthorized alteration of your information under our control. However, given the inherent risks, we cannot guarantee absolute security and consequently, we cannot ensure or warrant the security of any information you transmit to us and you do so at your own risk.
privacy_third_party_title: Third Party Links & Use Of Your Information
privacy_third_party_desc: Our Service may contain links to other websites that are not operated by us. This Privacy Policy does not address the privacy policy and other practices of any third parties, including any third party operating any website or service that may be accessible via a link on the Service. We strongly advise you to review the privacy policy of every site you visit. We have no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third party sites or services.
privacy_grievance_desc: If you have any queries or concerns about the processing of your information that is available with us, you may email our Grievance Officer at Sicily Good di Salvatore Guarneri, Cortile Gonzales 7, email: portasiciliainfo@gmail.com. We will address your concerns in accordance with applicable law.
terms_1_text: These Terms and Conditions apply to this website and to transactions related to our products and services. You may be bound by additional contracts relating to your relationship with us or any product or service you receive from us. If any provision of the additional contracts conflicts with any provision of these Terms, the provisions of such additional contracts shall control and prevail.
terms_2_text: By registering, accessing or otherwise using this website, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions set forth below. The mere use of this website implies knowledge and acceptance of these terms and conditions. In certain particular cases, we may also ask you to explicitly consent.
terms_3_text: By using this website or communicating with us electronically, you agree and acknowledge that we may communicate with you electronically on our website or by sending you an email, and you agree that all agreements, notices, disclosures, and other communications that we provide to you electronically satisfy any legal requirement, including but not limited to the requirement that such communications be in writing.
terms_4_text: We or our licensors own and control all copyright and other intellectual property rights in the website and the data, information and other resources displayed by or accessible within the website.
terms_4_1_text: Unless specific content dictates otherwise, you are not granted a license or any other right under copyright, trademark, patent or other intellectual property rights. This means that you will not use, copy, reproduce, perform, display, distribute, embed in any electronic medium, alter, reverse engineer, decompile, transfer, download, transmit, monetize, sell, market or commercialize any resources on this website in any form, without our prior written permission, except and only insofar as otherwise stipulated in regulations of mandatory law (such as the right to quote).
terms_5_text_1: Our website may include hyperlinks or other references to other parties' websites. We do not monitor or review the content of other parties' websites which are linked to from this website. Products or services offered by other websites are subject to the applicable Terms and Conditions of those third parties. Opinions expressed or material appearing on those websites are not necessarily shared or endorsed by us.
terms_5_text_2: We will not be responsible for any privacy practices or content of these sites. You bear all risks associated with the use of these websites and any related third-party services. We will not accept any responsibility for any loss or damage in whatever manner, howsoever caused, resulting from your disclosure to third parties of personal information.
terms_6_text_1: By visiting our website, you agree to use it only for the purposes intended and as permitted by these Terms, any additional agreement with us, and applicable laws and regulations, as well as generally accepted online practices and industry guidelines. You must not use our website or our services to use, publish or distribute any material which consists of (or is linked to) malicious computer software; use data collected from our website for any direct marketing activity, or conduct any systematic or automated data collection activities on or in relation to our website.
terms_6_text_2: Engaging in any activity that causes, or may cause, damage to the website or that interferes with the performance, availability, or accessibility of the website is strictly prohibited.
terms_7_1_text_1: Porta Sicilia operates as an intermediary between the user and the host/service provider.
terms_7_1_text_2: Pursuant to Article 59, paragraph 1, letter n) of the Italian Consumer Code, the 14-day right of withdrawal does not apply to contracts relating to leisure activities (such as experiences, tours and tourism services) when the contract provides for a specific date or period of performance.
terms_7_1_text_3: Therefore, once the booking is confirmed, the user may cancel exclusively according to the cancellation policies set out in this article.
terms_7_2_text: For experiences or tours booked through our website:
terms_7_2_item_1: the booking is initiated through payment of a service fee to Porta Sicilia;
terms_7_2_item_2: Porta Sicilia forwards the request to the organizer (host) for availability verification;
terms_7_2_item_3: upon confirmation, the host will directly contact the customer within 24 hours to provide operational information and arrange payment of the balance.
terms_7_2_no_confirm: If the host does not confirm availability, Porta Sicilia will issue a full refund of the service fee paid.
terms_7_2_cancel_free: ✔ Free cancellation up to 48 hours before the start of the activity — A full refund of the amount paid is provided.
terms_7_2_cancel_late: ❌ Cancellation made less than 48 hours before the activity — No refund is provided.
terms_7_2_cancel_noshow: ⚠️ No-show — In case of failure to appear at the established time and place, no refund is provided.
terms_7_3_item_1: availability is provided by the hosts;
terms_7_3_item_2: the booking is considered initiated upon payment of the service fee to Porta Sicilia;
terms_7_3_item_3: Porta Sicilia forwards the booking to the host, who commits to contacting the customer within 24 hours to provide practical details and define the payment terms for the balance.
terms_7_3_cancel_30: ✔️ Up to 30 days before check-in — Refund of any amounts paid to the host. The service fee paid to Porta Sicilia is non-refundable.
terms_7_3_cancel_late: ❌ Less than 30 days before check-in — No refund is due, unless different conditions are applied by the host.
terms_7_3_issues_text: In case of unavailability of the accommodation or serious issues attributable to the host, the user shall be entitled to:
terms_7_3_issues_item_1: a full refund of all amounts paid, including the service fee; or
terms_7_3_issues_item_2: alternative accommodation of equal level, if available.
terms_7_4_text_1: Refunds under Porta Sicilia's responsibility will be processed within 14 business days from cancellation confirmation, using the same payment method used for the purchase, unless otherwise agreed in writing with the user.
terms_7_4_text_2: Credit times may vary depending on the payment network.
terms_8_title: Limitations of Liability and Operating Conditions
terms_8_1_title: Role of Porta Sicilia and Host Responsibility
terms_8_1_text: Porta Sicilia operates exclusively as a technological intermediary between the user and the hosts offering experiences, tours and accommodations. The user acknowledges that:
terms_8_1_item_1: the contract relating to the provision of the service is concluded directly with the host;
terms_8_1_item_2: the host is solely responsible for the correct execution of the booked service;
terms_8_1_item_3: Porta Sicilia is not responsible for any defaults, cancellations, delays, program changes or service discrepancies attributable to the host.
terms_8_1_note: Porta Sicilia's liability remains in force in the cases provided by law for intermediation activities.
terms_8_2_text: The user is required to appear punctually at the location, date and time indicated for the activity or for accommodation check-in.
terms_8_2_item_2: delay such as to prevent participation,
terms_8_2_note: the booking will be considered used and no refund will be due, unless otherwise expressly indicated by the host.
terms_8_3_text: To the extent permitted by law, Porta Sicilia shall not be held liable for:
terms_8_3_item_1: service failures attributable to the host;
terms_8_3_item_2: interruptions or modifications of the activity due to causes beyond its control;
terms_8_3_item_3: indirect damages, loss of opportunity, loss of profit or consequential damages suffered by the user;
terms_8_3_note: Liability for willful misconduct or gross negligence in cases provided by applicable law remains unaffected in any case.
terms_8_4_title: Procedure in Case of Disputes and Chargebacks
terms_8_4_text_1: The user agrees, in case of problems relating to the booking, to contact Porta Sicilia beforehand to allow verification and possible resolution of the dispute.
terms_8_4_text_2: Opening payment disputes (chargebacks) without a prior resolution attempt may result in suspension of the user account and transmission of booking documentation to the competent payment institution.
terms_8_4_text_3: All user rights provided by applicable consumer protection legislation remain reserved.
terms_9_text: Do not submit ideas, inventions, works of authorship or other information that may be considered your own intellectual property that you would like to present to us, unless we have first signed an intellectual property agreement or a non-disclosure agreement. If you disclose it to us in the absence of such written agreement, you grant us a worldwide, irrevocable, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, store, adapt, publish, translate and distribute your content in any existing or future media.
terms_10_text: We may, at our sole discretion, at any time modify or discontinue access, temporarily or permanently, to the website or any service on it. You agree that we will not be liable to you or any third party for any modification, suspension, or discontinuance of your access to, or use of, the website or any content that you may have shared on the website. You will not be entitled to any compensation or other payment, even if certain features, settings, and/or any Content you contributed or relied on, are permanently lost. You may not circumvent, or attempt to circumvent, any access restriction measures on our website.
terms_11_text_1: Nothing in this section will limit or exclude any warranty implied by law that it would be unlawful to limit or exclude. This website and all content on the website are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis and may include inaccuracies or typographical errors. We expressly disclaim all warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, as to the availability, accuracy, or completeness of the Content. We do not guarantee that:
terms_11_item_1: this website or our content will meet your requirements;
terms_11_item_2: this website will be available on an uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free basis.
terms_11_text_2: Nothing on this website constitutes, or is meant to constitute, advice of any kind. If you require advice you should consult an appropriate professional.
terms_11_text_3: The following provisions of this section shall apply to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law and shall not limit or exclude our liability in respect of any matter which it would be unlawful for us to limit or to exclude our liability. In no event shall we be liable for any direct or indirect damages (including any damages for loss of profits or revenue, loss or corruption of data, software or database, or loss of or harm to property or data) incurred by you or any third party, arising from your access to, or use of, our website.
terms_11_text_4: Except to the extent that any additional contract expressly states otherwise, our maximum liability to you for all damages arising out of or related to the website or any products and services marketed or sold through the website, regardless of the form of legal action that imposes liability (whether in contract, equity, negligence, intended conduct, tort or otherwise) shall be limited to the total price that you paid to us to purchase such products or services or use the website. Such limit shall apply in the aggregate to all of your claims, actions, and causes of action of every kind and nature.
terms_12_text: To access our website and/or our services, you may be required to provide certain information about yourself as part of the registration process. You agree that any information you provide will always be accurate, correct, and up to date.
terms_13_text: Access to the website from territories or countries where the Content or purchase of the products or Services sold on the website is illegal is prohibited. You may not use this website in violation of the export laws and regulations of Italy.
terms_14_text: Through this website we may engage in affiliate marketing whereby we receive a percentage or commission on the sale of services or products on or through this website. We may also accept sponsorships or other forms of advertising compensation from businesses. This disclosure is intended to comply with legal requirements on marketing and advertising that may apply.
terms_15_text: You may not assign, transfer, or sub-contract any of your rights and/or obligations under these Terms and Conditions, in whole or in part, to any third party without our prior written consent. Any purported assignment in violation of this Section shall be null and void.
terms_16_title: Breaches of These Terms and Conditions
terms_16_text: Without prejudice to our other rights under these Terms and Conditions, if you breach these Terms and Conditions in any way, we may take such action as we deem appropriate to deal with the breach, including temporarily or permanently suspending your access to the website, contacting your internet service provider to request that they block your access to the website, and/or commencing legal action against you.

You will promptly reimburse us for our damages, losses, costs, and expenses relating to or arising out of such claims.
terms_18_text: Failure to enforce any of the provisions set out in these Terms and Conditions and any Agreement, or failure to exercise any option to terminate, shall not be construed as waiver of such provisions and shall not affect the validity of these Terms and Conditions or of any Agreement or any part thereof, or the right thereafter to enforce each and every provision.
terms_19_text: These Terms and Conditions shall be interpreted and construed exclusively in Italian. All notices and correspondence shall be written exclusively in that language.
terms_20_text: These Terms and Conditions constitute the entire agreement between you and Sicily Good di Salvatore Guarneri in relation to your use of this website.
terms_21_text: We may update these Terms and Conditions from time to time. The date shown at the beginning of these Terms and Conditions is the latest revision date. If any part or provision of these Terms and Conditions is found by a court or other authority to be invalid and/or unenforceable under applicable law, such part or provision will be modified, deleted and/or enforced to the maximum extent permissible so as to give effect to the intent of these Terms and Conditions. The other provisions shall not be affected.
terms_22_text_2: This document governs the terms and conditions of sale of products marketed on the website www.portasicilia.it. The seller is Porta Sicilia, as indicated in the Legal Notes section of the website. Food products are sold in compliance with current regulations. Prices are expressed in Euros and include VAT, unless otherwise indicated. The sales contract is concluded with order confirmation. Shipping is carried out by courier. Any delays not attributable to the seller do not constitute liability of the same. The seller reserves the right to cancel incomplete or incorrect orders.
terms_23_text: This website is owned and operated by Sicily Good di Salvatore Guarneri. You can contact us regarding these Terms and Conditions by writing to us or sending us an email at the following address: portasiciliainfo@gmail.com — Cortile Gonzales 7, Lercara Friddi 90025.
seo_home_title: Things to Do in Sicily: Experiences, Stays & Holidays
seo_home_description: Discover authentic Sicily with Porta Sicilia: book unique experiences, traditional stays, tours and activities. Your complete guide to unforgettable holidays in Sicily.
seo_experiences_description: Explore the best experiences in Sicily: guided tours, food tastings, outdoor adventures and cultural activities. Book your Sicilian experience online.
seo_stays_title: Where to Stay in Sicily — Accommodation & Holiday Homes
seo_stays_description: Find the perfect accommodation in Sicily: holiday homes, B&Bs, villas and traditional apartments. Book your stay on the most beautiful Mediterranean island.
seo_locations_title: Destinations in Sicily — Places to Discover
seo_locations_description: Discover the best destinations in Sicily: from Palermo to Taormina, from Mount Etna to the Aeolian Islands. Complete guide to Sicilian locations with experiences and stays.
seo_location_suffix: Things to Do & Where to Stay
seo_categories_description: Explore Sicily by category: adventure, food & wine, culture, sea and relaxation. Find the perfect experience for your holiday in Sicily.
seo_blog_description: Read our Sicily guides: itineraries, travel tips, hidden gems and traditions. The Porta Sicilia blog to plan your holiday.
seo_hero_alt: Sicily panoramic view with sea and coastline
seo_faq_title: Frequently Asked Questions About Experiences & Accommodations in Sicily — Porta Sicilia
seo_faq_description: Everything you need to know about booking tourist experiences, food tours, villas and accommodations in Sicily on Porta Sicilia. Payments, cancellations, how it works.
faq_how_it_works_1_question: What is Porta Sicilia and how does it work for booking holidays in Sicily?
faq_how_it_works_1_answer: Porta Sicilia is an online platform for booking authentic tourist experiences and accommodations in Sicily, Italy. It connects travelers directly with local Sicilian hosts — tour guides, villa owners, farmhouse operators and B&B hosts — to discover the island authentically. On portasicilia.com you can search, compare and book food and wine tours, excursions, Sicilian cooking classes, villas with pools, seaside apartments and much more, all with secure online payment.
faq_how_it_works_2_question: How do I book an experience or accommodation on Porta Sicilia?
faq_how_it_works_2_answer: Booking on Porta Sicilia is simple: search for the Sicilian destination you're interested in (for example Taormina, Palermo, Cefalù, the Aeolian Islands), browse available experiences or accommodations, select dates and number of participants, then complete your booking with secure online payment. You'll receive a confirmation email with all the details.
faq_how_it_works_3_question: Do I need an account to book on Porta Sicilia?
faq_how_it_works_3_answer: Yes, to book on Porta Sicilia you need to sign up for free with your Google or Apple account. Registration takes just a few seconds and allows you to manage your bookings, save favorite experiences and receive updates about new tourist activities in Sicily.
faq_how_it_works_4_question: Is Porta Sicilia trustworthy? Who is behind the platform?
faq_how_it_works_4_answer: Porta Sicilia is a registered Italian platform based in Sicily. Every experience and accommodation is verified by our team before publication. Payments are processed through secure gateways with SSL encryption and personal data is handled in compliance with GDPR. All information about hosts, itineraries and conditions is transparent and visible before booking.
faq_how_it_works_5_question: What languages is Porta Sicilia available in?
faq_how_it_works_5_answer: Porta Sicilia is available in Italian and English, to welcome both Italian travelers and international tourists who want to visit Sicily. You can switch languages at any time using the language selector in the website navigation bar.
faq_experiences_1_question: What tourist experiences can I book in Sicily on Porta Sicilia?
faq_experiences_1_answer: On Porta Sicilia you'll find a wide selection of tourist experiences across all of Sicily: food and wine tours with Mount Etna wine tastings and local products, Sicilian cooking classes, boat trips to the Aeolian Islands and Zingaro Nature Reserve, Mount Etna trekking, cultural tours in Palermo, Syracuse, Agrigento and the Val di Noto, visits to historic markets like Vucciria and Ballarò, and outdoor activities such as snorkeling and kayaking. Every experience is curated by expert local Sicilian guides.
faq_experiences_2_question: Are Sicily experiences on Porta Sicilia suitable for families with children?
faq_experiences_2_answer: Many experiences on Porta Sicilia are designed for families with children, such as boat tours, nature reserve visits, cooking classes and family-friendly guided excursions. Each experience listing clearly indicates recommended age groups, any restrictions and whether reduced rates are available for children, teenagers or infants.
faq_experiences_3_question: What happens if there's bad weather on the day of my booked experience in Sicily?
faq_experiences_3_answer: For outdoor activities in Sicily (Mount Etna hikes, boat trips, snorkeling), in case of bad weather the local host will contact you to reschedule the experience to an alternative date. If rescheduling is not possible, you will receive a full refund of the amount paid on Porta Sicilia. The specific conditions are indicated on each experience listing.
faq_experiences_4_question: Can I book a private or exclusive experience for my group in Sicily?
faq_experiences_4_answer: Yes, many experiences on Porta Sicilia offer a private booking option, ideal for couples, families or groups of friends who want an exclusive tour. On the experience detail page you'll find whether private mode is available and any supplement. Among the most popular private experiences are private boat tours, reserved winery tastings and in-home cooking classes.
faq_experiences_5_question: How far in advance should I book a tourist experience in Sicily?
faq_experiences_5_answer: On Porta Sicilia we recommend booking at least 48 hours in advance to ensure availability. During peak season (June-September) and for the most popular experiences like Mount Etna excursions, Aeolian Islands tours and wine tastings, we recommend booking at least one week ahead. Booking in advance on portasicilia.com guarantees you the best price.
faq_accommodations_1_question: What types of holiday accommodations can I rent in Sicily on Porta Sicilia?
faq_accommodations_1_answer: On Porta Sicilia you can book villas with private pools, seaside holiday apartments, restored Sicilian farmhouses (masserie), rural countryside houses, B&Bs in historic city centers and traditional dammusi in Pantelleria. All accommodations are selected by our team for quality, authenticity and location, and are available across all of Sicily: from the Taormina and Cefalù coast to the interior, from the Aeolian Islands to the Val di Noto.
faq_accommodations_2_question: How does check-in work at accommodations booked on Porta Sicilia?
faq_accommodations_2_answer: After booking an accommodation on Porta Sicilia, you'll receive an email with detailed check-in instructions: arrival and departure times, driving directions, access code or host contact for key handover. Procedures vary by property — some offer self check-in with digital locks, others provide direct host welcome on arrival.
faq_accommodations_3_question: Can I bring pets to accommodations in Sicily on Porta Sicilia?
faq_accommodations_3_answer: The pet policy varies for each accommodation on Porta Sicilia. On the detail page of each villa, apartment or B&B you'll find clearly indicated whether pets are allowed, any surcharges and the property rules. We recommend filtering accommodations by 'pets allowed' during your search.
faq_accommodations_4_question: Do accommodations on Porta Sicilia offer extra services like breakfast or airport transfers?
faq_accommodations_4_answer: Many accommodations in Sicily on Porta Sicilia offer additional services: breakfast with typical Sicilian products, transfers from Catania or Palermo airport, daily cleaning, bicycle rental, private chef for dinners and concierge service for booking excursions. Available services are listed on the accommodation page with their respective costs.
faq_accommodations_5_question: What is the minimum stay for a holiday rental in Sicily?
faq_accommodations_5_answer: The minimum stay varies by accommodation and time of year. Generally, villas with pools require a minimum of 7 nights during peak season (July-August) and 3-4 nights the rest of the year. Apartments and B&Bs often have a minimum of 2 nights. Each accommodation on Porta Sicilia clearly indicates the minimum stay on the booking page.
faq_payments_1_question: What payment methods does Porta Sicilia accept for booking in Sicily?
faq_payments_1_answer: On Porta Sicilia you can pay with Visa, Mastercard and American Express credit and debit cards, as well as other secure digital payment methods. All prices are in euros (EUR). Payment is made entirely online at the time of booking, with no need to pay cash on arrival.
faq_payments_2_question: Are payments on Porta Sicilia secure?
faq_payments_2_answer: Yes, all payments on Porta Sicilia are protected by SSL encryption and processed through PCI-DSS certified payment gateways. We never store your credit card details. The platform complies with European GDPR regulations for personal data protection.
faq_payments_3_question: When is payment charged for a booking on Porta Sicilia?
faq_payments_3_answer: For tourist experiences, payment is charged immediately upon booking confirmation on Porta Sicilia. For accommodations, a deposit may be required at the time of booking with the balance due before check-in. Payment terms are always visible before completing your booking.
faq_payments_4_question: Can I pay in dollars or pounds on Porta Sicilia?
faq_payments_4_answer: All prices on Porta Sicilia are listed in euros (EUR), the local currency of Sicily and Italy. If you pay with a card in US dollars, British pounds or another currency, your bank will automatically apply the current exchange rate at the time of the transaction.
faq_payments_5_question: Will I receive a receipt or invoice after booking on Porta Sicilia?
faq_payments_5_answer: Yes, after every booking on Porta Sicilia you'll receive a payment confirmation email with all transaction details: amount, date, description of the experience or accommodation booked. For billing requests with tax identification numbers or VAT, you can contact our customer service.
faq_cancellation_1_question: What is the cancellation policy for bookings on Porta Sicilia?
faq_cancellation_1_answer: The cancellation policy on Porta Sicilia varies based on the experience or accommodation booked. Each booking listing clearly indicates the terms: free cancellation (within a certain number of days), partial penalty cancellation or non-refundable. We recommend always checking the specific conditions before completing your booking on portasicilia.com.
faq_cancellation_2_question: How do I cancel a booking on Porta Sicilia?
faq_cancellation_2_answer: To cancel a booking on Porta Sicilia, log into your account, go to the 'My Bookings' section and select the booking to cancel. The refund will be automatically calculated based on the cancellation policy of the experience or accommodation. You'll receive a cancellation confirmation email with refund details.
faq_cancellation_3_question: How long does a refund take after cancelling on Porta Sicilia?
faq_cancellation_3_answer: After cancelling a booking on Porta Sicilia, the refund is processed within 5-10 business days. Actual crediting times to your credit card or bank account depend on your bank and may take an additional 3-15 business days.
faq_cancellation_4_question: Can I change the date of an experience or accommodation already booked on Porta Sicilia?
faq_cancellation_4_answer: Date changes are subject to host availability. On Porta Sicilia we recommend cancelling the existing booking (checking refund conditions first) and creating a new one for the desired date. This way you'll have certainty of availability and the updated price.
faq_cancellation_5_question: What happens if the host cancels my experience or accommodation in Sicily?
faq_cancellation_5_answer: If the host cancels your booking on Porta Sicilia, you will receive a full 100% refund of the amount paid. Our team will contact you to help you find an equivalent alternative experience or accommodation in Sicily, at no additional cost.
faq_partner_1_question: How can I become a host or partner on Porta Sicilia and offer experiences in Sicily?
faq_partner_1_answer: To become a partner on Porta Sicilia and list your tourist experiences or accommodations in Sicily, register on portasicilia.com as an Owner. Fill in your profile with information about your business and submit your application. Our team will review the proposal and contact you within a few days to complete activation and publish your listings.
faq_partner_2_question: What are the requirements to become a host on Porta Sicilia?
faq_partner_2_answer: To become a host on Porta Sicilia we look for tour operators, licensed guides, property owners and businesses offering authentic Sicilian experiences or quality accommodations. You must have all licenses, authorizations and insurance required by Italian and Sicilian regional regulations. We evaluate each application to ensure high standards for travelers.
faq_partner_3_question: How much does it cost to list experiences or accommodations on Porta Sicilia?
faq_partner_3_answer: Registration and listing publication on Porta Sicilia is completely free. Porta Sicilia charges a commission only on bookings actually completed and paid by travelers. There are no fixed monthly costs or subscriptions. Commission rate details are communicated during the activation process.
faq_partner_4_question: How does the host dashboard work on Porta Sicilia?
faq_partner_4_answer: As a host on Porta Sicilia you have access to a dedicated dashboard where you can: manage your availability calendar, view and confirm incoming bookings, set prices and seasonal rates, update descriptions and photos of your experiences or accommodations, and monitor traveler reviews. The dashboard is accessible from both desktop and mobile browsers.
faq_partner_5_question: Can a host offer both tourist experiences and accommodations on Porta Sicilia?
faq_partner_5_answer: Yes, as a partner on Porta Sicilia you can list both tourist experiences (tours, tastings, excursions, classes) and accommodations (villas, apartments, B&Bs, farmhouses). Each listing is managed separately from the dashboard with its own calendar, rates and conditions. This allows you to diversify your offering and reach more travelers looking for holidays in Sicily.

partner_seo_description: Publish experiences and stays on Porta Sicilia. Visibility, bookings, easy management.
partner_hero_title: Bring your Sicilian experience to the world
partner_hero_subtitle: Publish experiences and stays on Porta Sicilia. Visibility, bookings, easy management.
partner_how_it_works_step_1_desc: Fill out the form in 3 minutes.
partner_how_it_works_step_2_desc: We evaluate your application within 3 working days.
partner_how_it_works_step_3_desc: We send you a secure link to access your partner area.
partner_how_it_works_step_4_desc: Create your listings and start receiving bookings.
partner_testimonials_1_quote: Since joining Porta Sicilia our direct bookings have doubled. What I love most is always talking with people who truly know the territory.
partner_testimonials_2_quote: Onboarding was effortless and the support is always there. We feel part of a real project, not just another listing platform.
partner_testimonials_3_quote: Finally a platform that values those who craft authentic experiences. Our calendar is fully booked through September.
partner_faq_q1: How much does it cost to become a partner?
partner_faq_a1: Registration is free. We only apply a commission on confirmed bookings.
partner_faq_a2: Our team reviews each application within 3 working days.
partner_faq_a3: We handle traveler payments securely and credit the net amount to you after the stay or experience is completed.
partner_faq_q4: Can I publish more than one listing?
partner_faq_a4: Yes, you can manage an unlimited number of experiences and stays from the same partner area.
partner_faq_a5: An Italian team is available via email to assist you at every stage, from creating your listing to managing bookings.
partner_faq_q6: Can I already be on other platforms?
partner_faq_a6: Yes, we don't require exclusivity. You can be present on other channels as well.
